sentences.text: Calling please way and a staff member will be with you shortly this call may be monitored or recorded for quality assurance. Thank you for calling if you were looking for information on renting or leasing and department please press one. If you are a resident and have a maintenance need and your apartment please press two. If you are a resident with a non, maintenance related question, please press three. If you are calling for any other reason please press four to repeat these options press nine. Thank you for calling please way and a staff member will be with you shortly this call may be monitored or recorded for quality assurance.

conversation.title: Call: Mitch  Scarski  and Megan Bennett @ Horizon Realty Advisors
